name: ABM Sourdough Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in the order given.
2. Bake on basic bread cycle. This can probably be timed.
3. With only 2 cups of flour, this makes a small (14 oz) loaf with a crunchy crust and a light interior. Not a dense bread. It's a rustic looking loaf that ought to be just the thing with stews or hearty soups.
Rye starter: 2 cups Rye flour, 2 cups warm water, 1 package yeast in a glass container. Leave at room temperature for about 3 days stirring when you think of it. When it starts to smell like a brewery, you can refrigerate it. Just bring it back to room temperature before using it.
Adapted from BREAD MACHINE BAKING, Brody & Apter
